description_long: This is a handheld flashlight with a cylindrical black body and a wide, circular head. The lamp features a ribbed grip along the handle for secure holding and a prominent on/off switch located near the head. The front of the lamp has a reflective, concave surface surrounding a single bulb, designed to focus and project light forward. The rear end is flat and slightly textured, likely for stability when standing upright. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability. This type of lamp is commonly used for portable illumination in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or during power outages.
description: A black, cylindrical handheld flashlight with a ribbed grip, wide head, and a single bulb set in a reflective concave surface. Features a prominent on/off switch and a utilitarian, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, circular lamp head with a reflective interior and central bulb.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed grip, cylindrical body, and the on/off switch near the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, textured end of the handle and the switch on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length of the body and the lamp head profile.
